videos.headline: Haaland leads the charge as Dortmund cruise past SC Freiburg
videos.title: Haaland leads the charge as Dortmund cruise past SC Freiburg
videos.caption: Erling Haaland scores twice in Borussia Dortmund's 5-1 victory vs. SC Freiburg.

videos.headline: Dortmund take control vs. Freiburg with Meunier's second goal
videos.title: Dortmund take control vs. Freiburg with Meunier's second goal
videos.caption: Thomas Meunier repeats his goal from earlier as he gives Dortmund a 2-0 lead with a header off a corner kick.
videos.description: Thomas Meunier repeats his goal from earlier as he gives Dortmund a 2-0 lead with a header off a corner kick.
